items.title: Tributes to Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head who dies aged 72
items.dek: The British actor, who also appeared in Merlin and Little Britain, died of complications from pneumonia.

items.title: Armenia braces for election as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
items.dek: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.
